name: TC-OT-001 — GET /api/v1/token: Returns 200 with complete KCB token object
description:
**What this test does:**
Calls GET /oauth-token/api/v1/token with a valid RMS Bearer token and verifies the response is HTTP 200 and the body contains all four expected fields: access_token, token_type, expires_at, issued_at.

**Why it matters:** This is the primary happy-path check. If this fails, no downstream service that depends on the KCB OAuth token can function.
descriptionHtml:
What this test does:
Calls GET /oauth-token/api/v1/token with a valid RMS Bearer token and verifies the response is HTTP 200 and the body contains all four expected fields: access_token, token_type, expires_at, issued_at.

Why it matters: This is the primary happy-path check. If this fails, no downstream service that depends on the KCB OAuth token can function.
